author: suctl
description: Manages Let's Encrypt / ACME certificates via the certbot CLI.

capabilities.name: certbot.cert.list
capabilities.description: List all certbot-managed certificates with expiry and SAN domains.

capabilities.name: certbot.cert.read
capabilities.description: Read one certbot-managed certificate by name (primary domain).

capabilities.name: certbot.cert.provision
capabilities.description: Provision a new Let's Encrypt certificate via certbot --nginx.

capabilities.name: certbot.cert.renew
capabilities.description: Renew a certbot-managed certificate via certbot renew --cert-name.

capabilities.name: certbot.cert.remove
capabilities.description: Delete a certbot-managed certificate via certbot delete --cert-name.
